name: 9_centromere_alpha_satellite
description: Chr9 alpha-satellite higher-order repeat array (D9Z1/D9Z4) at the active centromere. T2T-CHM13 resolved the array to ~7 Mb; sits between the 9p12 HSat3 block and 9q12 heterochromatin, making chr9 the most heterochromatin-rich autosome.

architecture.internal_structure: Active alpha-satellite higher-order repeat embedded in CENP-A chromatin; flanked by HSat3 on p side and heterochromatin block on q side.
